description_long: This house features a steeply pitched thatched roof with a natural, textured appearance, extending over the main structure and partially covering a small front porch. The walls are constructed from light-colored materials, possibly plastered wood or adobe, and are accented with blue trim around the windows and along the corners. The front facade includes a central arched doorway and several small, square windows, while the rear and side elevations display a mix of window sizes and a small attic vent. The gable ends are painted in a muted reddish-brown, contrasting with the lighter walls and thatched roof. The overall design is rustic and traditional, evoking rural European or Eastern European vernacular architecture. Decorative blue dots and trim add a touch of folk art character to the otherwise simple exterior.
description: A rustic house with a steep thatched roof, light-colored walls, blue-trimmed windows, and folk art accents. The design is traditional and evokes rural European architecture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thatched roof, central arched doorway, small porch, and blue-trimmed windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the steep roof pitch, reddish-brown gable, and a small attic window.
description_view_2: Rear view with a thatched roof, central window in the gable, and a less prominent entryway.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying two small windows, a reddish-brown gable, and blue trim details.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with a small porch, blue trim, and decorative folk art accents.
